name: @platform/contracts-organisation
description: Organisation profile contract package: OrganisationProfile schema, update request/response shapes.

readme.summary: Organisation profile contract package: OrganisationProfile schema, update request/response shapes.
responsibilities: Own OrganisationProfile Zod schema and TypeScript type
Define UpdateOrganisationProfileRequest schema with validation constraints
Expose the OrganisationProfile shape as the get/update profile response type
nonResponsibilities: Does not implement organisation data access or persistence
Does not import React or any framework-specific packages
Does not own session or authentication logic
usage: Imported by application and platform packages that need organisation contract types
Used in API boundaries to validate and type organisation profile data
operationalNotes: All schemas use Zod for runtime validation
Zero @platform/* dependencies ? this is a pure contract package
